title: Engage at least 1 candidate steward for adoption
context: M0 outreach (partner-001) initiates contact with candidate partners. This M1 task deepens that engagement by presenting the live pipeline and the first consented batch as evidence of a real, trustworthy corpus. At least one candidate steward must move to an active conversation (responded, in-discussion status in the outreach log) before M1 can exit. The steward's eventual adoption is the project's 'delivered' bar. Depends on place-name-pronunciation-partner-001.
objective: Using the outreach log from partner-001, present at least 1 candidate steward with the M1 evidence package (pipeline, consented batch, CI gates, audit report) and advance them to an active conversation (responded or in-discussion status).
acceptanceCriteria: At least 1 candidate steward from the partner-001 outreach log has been presented with the M1 evidence package.
The outreach log is updated to show at least 1 candidate at responded or in-discussion status.
The evidence package presented includes: a description of the corpus pipeline, the first consented batch, the CI gates, and the M1 audit result.
The log entry records the org name, contact point, date of presentation, and current engagement status.
verifiedNeed remains false until a steward formally commits.
Maintainer reviews and approves the updated outreach log before the task is marked done.
output: Updated OUTREACH-LOG.md committed via PR with at least 1 candidate steward at responded or in-discussion status.
